title: Notification for user fee collection bearing S.O. No. 648 dated 07.07.2000
description: Notification for user fee collection bearing S.O. No. 648 dated 07.07.2000
text: REGD. NO. D. L -33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 454] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, JULY 7,2000/ASADHA 16,1922 1872 GI/2000 -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3 (ii)] -- 2 of 4 -- 3 MINISTRY OF SURFACE TRANSPORT (Department of Road Transport and Highways) (ROADS WING) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th July, 2000 S.O. 648(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) , the Central Government, having regard to expenditure involved in building, maintenance, management and operation of the part of National Highway, that is, Road Over Bridge in Kms.415/800 ( in lieu of level crossing ) near Nashirabad village and its approaches and strengthening in Km.414/000 to Kms 419/000 of National Highway-6 in District Jalgaon ( hereinafter referred as the bridge) , interest on the capital invested, reasonable return on the capital invested, the volume of traffic and the period of agreement entered into with M/s Ashoka Vastushilp Private Limited having its registered office at 1/2 River View Ashok Stambh, NASHIK-422002, hereby notifies that there shall be levied and paid fees on mechanic vehicles for the use of the bridge at the rates specified in the Schedule below and authorizes the said M/s Ashoka Vastushilp Private Limited to collect and retain fees at the rates specified in the said Schedule from 15.7.2000 (the date of its opening) to 15th October, 2009. S C H E D U L E (Rates to be recovered from users of the bridge) SI. No. 1. 2. 3. 4. 5. Categories of Vehicles Motor cycle, scooter or any other two wheeler mechanically propelled vehicle Motor car, Taxi, Jeep, Pick up van, Station Wagon, Tempo, Auto- rickshaw , three wheeler scooter or other auto driven light vehicle with or without trailor. Buses Trucks or tanker Heavy vehicle including truck trailor combination other mechanically propelled vehicle not mentioned above like mobile crane, dozer, earth mover, road roller, container Fee rates in Rs. per vehicle per trip Year of concession period 15.7.2000 (The date of opening) to 15.11.2002 Nil 5 15 20 30 16.11.2002 to 15.11.2007 Nil 8 20 25 35 16.11.2007 to 15.10.2009 Nil 10 25 30 40 -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC 3(ii)] NOTES: 1. When the same vehicle has to cross the bridge more than once in a day, the user shall have the option to pay one and half times the above rates while crossing the bridge in the first trip itself or if the vehicle has to use the bridge continuously and quite frequently for entire month or even beyond that for much longer period, the vehicle owner can have a monthly pass on the payment of charges equal to 30 single rate applicable to it as specified in the Schedule above. 2. Following types of vehicles are exempted from the fees specified in the schedule, namely:- (i) Defence vehicles, (ii) Vehicles with VIP symbols, (iii) Police Vehicles, (iv) Fire Fighting Vehicles, (v) Ambulances, (vi) , Funeral Vans, (vii) Post and Telegraphs Department Vehicles and (viii) Central and State Government Vehicles. 3. The vehicles officially belonging to the following shall be deemed to be vehicles having VIP symbols, namely:- i) President of India, ii) Vice-President of India, iii) Central and State Minister, iv) Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha or Rajya Sabha, State Legislature having the status of Cabinet Minister, v) Governors of States, vi) Lieutenant Governors of Union Territories, vii) Speakers or Chairman of Central and State Legislatures, viii) Executive Councilors of Local Elected Bodies, ix) Foreign dignitaries on State visit to India, x) Foreign Diplomats stationed in India using cars with Car Diplomatic (CD) symbols. 4. The above mentioned rates shall be displayed on a board erected at conspicuous places in the vicinity of the bridge. The said M/s Ashoka Vastushilp Private Limited or its authorised legal representative shall give a receipt to the payer on each and every occasion of recovery of fee under this notification. [F. No. RW/NH-12013/172/96-W (Mah)] ASHOKE JOSHI. Secy. -- 4 of 4 --
